title: add --cert-dir image sign
body:
Requirement from #2726
Add --cert-dir for `podman image sign`.

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: :umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #3617) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
